name: sr_second_plan_status_check
notes: Variation on the queue-busy rail: instead of re-asking for the SAME plan, the owner sends a casual status-check ('any update?') while the first win-back approval is pending. Must still surface the pending-approval state honestly — never a false 'campaign sent' claim, never silence, never D1. DEPENDENCY: same as sr_second_plan_queue_busy — step 2 only exercises the pending-approval path if step 1 actually armed one; check the step-1 transcript before treating a step-2 FAIL as confirmed. Run: `setup --onboarded --seed-lapsed-customers 12 --name convo-harness-<id>` then `script <tenant> sr_second_plan_status_check.json`.

steps.message: can you draft a win-back plan for my customers who've stopped ordering?
steps.note: First ask — expected to delegate to Sales-Recovery and arm a pending approval.

Casual status-check phrasing (not a repeated plan ask) while the first plan is pending. Expect the reply to honestly reference the outstanding approval — never a claim the campaign already went out, never silence, never D1.
